title: Mini Madness (26.1+)
description: this mod expands on Minecraft 26.1 (Tiny Takeover)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uL2hO9QKd4M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
**Welcome to the mod that expands on Minecraft 26.1 (Tiny Takeover) Drop

With the first update to this mod we added the ability to breed more mobs like Parrots, Camel Husks, Polar Bears & More!

We also added more bucket mobs but these come in baby form so you can now pick up baby versions of Squids, Dolphins & Nautilus 

The first update is quite Eggcelent (sorry for the pun), we have added the function to place chicken eggs as blocks and these function just like turtle eggs but will only hatch on haybales and comes in all 3 chicken egg variants,
Did i mention Breedable parrots now have eggs that can hatch or be used as decoration**
